# X-Ops Conference

> X-Ops Conference es el mayor evento de DevOps, DevSecOps, AIOps, MLOps, Platform Engineering y Ciberseguridad en España. Se celebra en Madrid con formato Summit + Conference.

## About

X-Ops Conference is an international technology conference held in Madrid, Spain. The event focuses on DevOps, DevSecOps, AIOps, MLOps, Platform Engineering, SRE, and Cybersecurity topics.

- **Edition 2026**: Madrid · URJC · November/December 2026
- **Format**: 2-day Executive Summit (C-Level) + 2-day Technical Conference
- **Attendees**: 500+ expected (300+ in 2025)
- **Rating**: 4.7/5 (2025 edition)
- **Tracks**: DevSecOps, Platform Engineering, AIOps/MLOps, SRE, Ciberseguridad
- **Languages**: Spanish and English

## Organizer

X-Ops Conference is organized by the X-Ops community, part of HSM (Hacker Dreams & Social Media).
Contact: info@xopsconference.com
Website: https://xopsconference.com
Phone: +34 744 644 873

## Sponsorship

Sponsorship packages available for Madrid, Dubai, and London editions. Tiers: Platinum (€8,000+), Track Sponsor (€6,000), Gold (€3,000), Silver (€2,000), Welcome Pack (€350), Startup Pack (€350–€950).
Contact: info@xopsconference.com
